## Description

Integrate Locus protocol to enable agent-native payments, spending controls, and auditability for the VeilTrader agent. This will allow the agent to make and receive payments using Locus, which is designed for agent-to-agent transactions.

This enhancement targets the "Best Use of Locus" track ($2,000 1st place, $1,500 2nd place, $1,000 3rd place).

## Features to Implement

- Integrate Locus SDK or contracts for payments
- Add functions for the agent to receive payments via Locus
- Add functions for the agent to make payments via Locus (if applicable)
- Implement spending limits and controls using Locus
- Events for Locus transactions
- Tests for Locus functionality
- Example usage in documentation

## Benefits

- Enables agent-native programmable money
- Provides built-in spending controls and auditability
- Facilitates agent-to-agent transactions
- Compatible with the agent's autonomous nature

## References

- Locus Protocol: https://locus.chat/
- Locus Documentation: https://docs.locus.chat/
